data.title: Eric Trump Discusses Family's Shift to Cryptocurrency After Banking Challenges
data.description: According to Cointelegraph, Eric Trump, son of U.S. President Donald Trump, revealed that the Trump family became advocates for cryptocurrency following a series of banking challenges they faced after the Capitol attack incident in early 2021. Several banks reportedly closed hundreds of accounts associated with the Trump Organization without explanation, prompting the family to rely on regional banks before eventually transitioning to a new, undisclosed banking institution. Eric Trump expressed his realization of the financial system's fragility and its potential for misuse during this period.Eric Trump, speaking at Consensus 2025, attributed the account closures to political motivations, which influenced his pro-crypto stance. He noted that industry insiders informed him of the Biden administration's alleged efforts to restrict crypto companies' access to banking services through regulatory pressure. This perceived weaponization of the financial system against them mirrored their own experiences, according to Trump. In March 2025, the Trump Organization filed a lawsuit against Capital One, alleging that the bank's closure of their accounts was politically motivated, resulting in significant financial harm. Subsequently, Eric Trump warned that banks must embrace cryptocurrency or risk obsolescence within a decade.The Trump family's involvement in the crypto industry has drawn criticism, with some alleging that they have leveraged it for personal gain. This includes the launch of Donald Trump's official memecoin, TRUMP, shortly before his inauguration as the 47th U.S. president. Additionally, World Liberty Financial, co-founded by Donald Trump and his sons, offers the USD1 stablecoin. Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. are also founders of American Bitcoin, a subsidiary of Hut 8, which raised $220 million for Bitcoin acquisition and mining equipment. An August 2025 report estimated Donald Trump's crypto-related wealth at $2.4 billion.Eric Trump has denied accusations that the family profited from Donald Trump's presidency and has suggested the possibility of a family member running for the presidency in the 2028 election. The Trump family's growing ties to the crypto industry continue to be a topic of discussion and scrutiny.

data.title: Crypto Set to Join U.S. Retirement Plans as a New Investment Option
data.description: Binance Blog published a new article, highlighting the inclusion of cryptocurrencies as a potential investment option in U.S. retirement plans. This development follows U.S. President Donald Trump's recent executive order, which paves the way for alternative assets like Bitcoin to be part of retirement portfolios. The 401(k) system, a cornerstone of American retirement savings, traditionally involves investments in stocks, bonds, and mutual funds. With the inclusion of crypto, the landscape of retirement investing is poised for significant change.The U.S. 401(k) market is substantial, with assets totaling $16.8 trillion. A mere 1% allocation of these funds into Bitcoin could inject $168 billion into the crypto market, potentially increasing Bitcoin's market cap by approximately 7.4%. This move mirrors the trajectory seen with Bitcoin ETFs, which amassed over $200 billion in assets shortly after their introduction. The inclusion of crypto in retirement plans could similarly accelerate the adoption of digital assets, bridging the gap between traditional finance and the burgeoning crypto market. This shift in the U.S. could also inspire global policymakers to consider similar measures, potentially leading to widespread acceptance of crypto as a mainstream retirement asset.Despite the promising outlook, the transition to include digital assets in retirement plans will take time. Plan administrators, such as employers and governments, may impose additional restrictions on investment options, meaning that crypto may not be immediately available to all investors. However, individuals can still independently allocate funds to crypto, much like they would with traditional assets, without waiting for institutional approval. This proactive approach allows investors to gain exposure to digital assets and potentially benefit from their growth.Binance offers a platform for individuals to invest in crypto without the need for employer or government endorsement. Users can purchase digital assets directly with debit or credit cards and set up recurring purchases to automate their investments. Unlike traditional retirement plans, crypto investments on Binance are not locked in, allowing users to cash out at their discretion. Additionally, Binance provides opportunities to grow crypto holdings through Binance Earn and facilitates everyday transactions with Binance Pay. This flexibility and accessibility make crypto a versatile investment option beyond traditional retirement savings.The potential inclusion of crypto in retirement plans marks a significant milestone in the financial landscape. As history has shown with ETFs, such developments can lead to broader adoption and integration of digital assets. While traditional finance systems adapt, individuals have the opportunity to shape their financial futures with crypto investments on platforms like Binance, free from bureaucratic constraints.

data.title: Erigon.tech CTO's Social Media Account Compromised in Cyber Attack
data.description: According to Foresight News, blockchain investigator ZachXBT has reported that the X account of Giulio Rebuffo, the Chief Technology Officer of erigon.tech, has been hacked. The compromised account has been used to send fraudulent messages to various key opinion leaders. The erigon.tech team is actively working to resolve the issue and promises to provide updates as soon as possible.

data.title: Cryptocurrency market wipes out $130 billion in 24 hours
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market faced heavy selling pressure in recent hours as traders reacted to large whale movements and rising outflows from spot exchange-traded funds (ETFs). As of press time, the global crypto market capitalization stood at $3.88 trillion, down from $4.01 trillion just 24 hours earlier, a $130 billion loss
source: https://finbold.com/cryptocurrency-market-wipes-out-130-billion-in-24-hours/

data.title: Public Companies Quietly Loading Up on Solana, Turning Treasuries Into Yield Machines
data.description:
Many publicly traded companies are discreetly acquiring large amounts of Solana, a leading cryptocurrency, as part of their investment strategies. This strategic move is enabling them to transform their treasury reserves into powerful sources of yield, allowing them to capitalize on the growing potential of digital assets while maximizing their financial returns.
source: https://blocknews.com/public-companies-quietly-loading-up-on-solana-turning-treasuries-into-yield-machines/
